debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
m R : NNReal
hr : R ≠ 0
⊢ centerOfMass (RigidBody.solidSphere d.succ m R) = 0

proof:
unfold centerOfMass
  ext i
  simp only [solidSphere, mass]
  simp only [LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk]
  have key : ∫ (x : Space d.succ) in Metric.closedBall 0 (R : ℝ), x i ∂volume = 0 := by
    suffices h : ∫ (x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin d.succ)) in Metric.closedBall 0 (R : ℝ), x i ∂volume =
      -∫ (x : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin d.succ)) in Metric.closedBall 0 (R : ℝ), x i ∂volume by linarith
    rw [← integral_neg]
    conv_lhs =>
      rw [← Measure.map_neg_eq_self (volume : Measure (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin d.succ)))]
    rw [show (Neg.neg : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin d.succ) → _) = (MeasurableEquiv.neg _) from rfl]
    rw [setIntegral_map_equiv (MeasurableEquiv.neg _)]
    simp only [MeasurableEquiv.neg_apply]
    congr 1
    ext x; simp
  rw [key]
  simp
